steps.name: docker_compose_config
steps.stdout_tail:
name: jiebang
services:
  sandbox-image:
    build:
      context: D:\race\jiebang
      dockerfile: docker/sandbox.Dockerfile
    command:
      - python
      - -c
      - print('xa-guard sandbox image built')
    image: xa-guard/sandbox:latest
    networks:
      default: null
  xa-guard:
    build:
      context: D:\race\jiebang
      dockerfile: docker/xa-guard.Dockerfile
    command:
      - python
      - -m
      - xa_guard.server
      - --config
      - configs/xa-guard.docker.yaml
      - --log-level
      - INFO
    depends_on:
      sandbox-image:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    environment:
      PYTHONPATH: /app/src:/app
      XA_GUARD_PROFILE: docker-compose-l3
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - python
        - -c
        - import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:3000/healthz', timeout=2).read()
      timeout: 3s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 12
      start_period: 20s
    image: xa-guard:latest
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "13000"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: D:\race\jiebang\configs
        target: /app/configs
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: D:\race\jiebang\policies
        target: /app/policies
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: D:\race\jiebang\logs
        target: /app/logs
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /var/run/docker.sock
        target: /var/run/docker.sock
        bind: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: jiebang_default
